_meta.description: Roborock AppPlugin error definitions. Translation keys resolve through roborock_strings.json.

7.fallback: The robot is stuck, or main wheels are jammed.

8.fallback: The robot is trapped or stuck.

24.fallback: No-Go Zone or Invisible Wall detected

28.fallback: The robot may be on a carpet

42.fallback: Check that the water filter has been correctly installed.

44.fallback: Check and secure the dirty water tank cover

130.fallback: No data from clean water tank peristaltic pump ODO

131.fallback: Over-current of clean water tank peristaltic pump

137.fallback: Wash roller motor temperature too high

140.fallback: Main brush motor temperature too high

141.fallback: Left wheel motor temperature too high

143.fallback: Right wheel motor temperature too high

153.fallback: Fill&Drain-water inlet electronic valve/clean water level Hall sensor error

158.fallback: Fill&Drain- dirty water level Hall sensor error
